calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Vacated

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David Marcolini, Esq. appeared for plaintiff U.S. Bank National Association, as Trustee for the Registered Holders of Mastr Asset Backed Securities Trust 2007-WMC1 Mortgage Pass Through Certificates Series 2007-WMC1 Successor Lender by Mesne Transfers from Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc., as Nominee for WMC Mortgage Corp., a California Corporation.
Maria Vinzon, a Realtor for Century 21, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Ismael Lara.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 6, 2009.
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment as to defendant Isidro Perez was filed on July 15, 2009.

Exhibit 1--Certified Copy of the Trustee's Deed Upon Sale dated 7/24/08--------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff U.S. Bank National Association, as Trustee for the Registered Holders of Mastr Asset Backed Securities Trust 2007-WMC1 Mortgage Pass Through Certificates Series 2007-WMC1 Successor Lender by Mesne Transfers from Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc., as Nominee for WMC Mortgage Corp., a California Corporation, and against defendant Ismael Lara as follows:

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1729 Geneva Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94134. The lease is forfeited. Counsel stipulated to the return of the exhibit.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than July 24, 2009.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Continued To Jul-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
